overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Discovery Tour showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Asklepios in ancient Greece. The player walks from the exterior colonnade into the temple interior, examining architectural details, painted murals, and votive offerings before triggering a discovery interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: Greek temple exterior colonnade and entrance ramp

events.description: passing through the massive stone columns into the temple interior

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone ramp toward the temple entrance between massive Doric columns

entered.detail: wide stone ramp leading up to the temple entrance with grass growing between cracks
massive fluted stone columns with simple capitals supporting the temple porch
rough-hewn stone block walls of the temple structure
bronze fire bowl with flames burning near the entrance
large rectangular entranceway leading into the dark interior sanctuary

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the exterior approach to a Greek temple, with the camera walking up a stone ramp flanked by massive Doric columns. The bright Mediterranean sunlight illuminates the rough stone walls and a burning brazier near the entrance as the player approaches the dark temple doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior nave with cult statue and mosaic flooring

events.description: approaching the central cult statue of Asklepios at the far end of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking down the central aisle toward the cult statue, following two robed figures ahead

notable_agents.action: robed figure in red walking ahead toward the statue
robed figure in white walking alongside the red-robed figure

entered.detail: fluted stone columns lining the interior space with decorative bands
massive seated statue of the healing god with a snake coiled around the staff
intricate geometric patterned tile flooring in red and cream colors
painted narrative scenes on the upper walls depicting mythological figures
carved stone relief panels showing processional scenes
low stone seating along the wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the temple, the camera moves through the columned nave with intricate mosaic flooring underfoot. Two robed NPCs walk ahead toward a massive cult statue of Asklepios visible at the far end, while painted murals and carved reliefs decorate the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple upper walls and coffered ceiling near roof opening

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the painted friezes on the upper walls
panning right to view the architectural pediment and ceiling details

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera upward to examine the colorful wall murals and architectural details near the roof opening

entered.detail: elaborate painted frieze showing battle scenes with warriors in red and blue tones
decorated ceiling with recessed square panels painted in red and gold
rectangular opening in the roof revealing blue sky and clouds above
triangular gable end with decorative moldings and painted details
brightly painted yellow architectural panel on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the temple's upper architecture, revealing elaborate painted friezes depicting battle scenes, a coffered ceiling with red and gold decoration, and a roof opening that frames the blue sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple wall with votive offerings and discovery site

events.description: focusing on the wall covered with clay votive body part offerings
discovery interaction triggered, UI popup shows 'Discovery Site Uncovered: Offerings' with a clay foot

agents.ego_description: examining the clay votive offerings on the wall and interacting with the discovery site

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing before the statue examining it

entered.detail: terracotta clay body parts (arms, legs, hands, feet) hanging on the wall as offerings
carved stone panels showing seated figures and standing attendants
large bronze bowl on a stand near the wall
massive seated statue visible again as camera turns back

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on a wall covered with terracotta votive offerings in the shape of human limbs, hung as dedications to the healing god. The player examines these artifacts before a UI popup appears indicating a discovery site has been uncovered, while the two robed NPCs stand before the central statue in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bright, sun-drenched exterior of a Greek temple into its ornate, shadowed interior. It begins by ascending a stone ramp flanked by massive Doric columns and a burning brazier before passing through a dark doorway into the temple's nave. As the camera moves across intricate mosaic flooring, the scene opens up to reveal painted murals and a distant cult statue of Asklepios, while the perspective tilts upward to capture red and gold coffered ceilings and a roof opening that frames the blue sky. The view then shifts toward a wall adorned with terracotta votive offerings in the shape of human limbs, finally pausing on these artifacts as a discovery UI popup appears while the robed figures remain stationed by the central statue in the background.
